description: Welcome to Founders Block, a LEED Gold community by reputable developer Anthem Properties in the highly desirable Moodyville neighbourhood of North Vancouver. Arguably the nicest townhome in the complex, this exceptional south-west facing corner residence is flooded with natural light and positioned on the quiet side, offering panoramic city, water, and mountain views. This mint-condition 4-bedroom, 3-bath home features an open-concept layout with high ceilings, a stone island kitchen with gas range, radiant in-floor heating, office nook, upper laundry, oversized storage, a spa-like primary suite with walk-in closet and view deck, two secure parking stalls, and steps to Lower Lonsdale, the SeaBus, Moodyville Park, and The Shipyards.
